{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302391880294762C305744DEAC2"}"},"total":387},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7421929749435876121","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"整体感觉还不错，剧情进展蛮快的。主要我比较喜欢主角的性格，很温柔吧。而且这里面的配角们也很努力也很勇敢，谁不是顶着巨大的压力，努力活着呢？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728054998,"group_id":"7387422173717089304","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5k18obzkZdvpNscTeRddwFcME5pnoVdKqolxPZCy4mN","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7aaf85e4637847949bd4acdf5eb21eac~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789070&x-signature=K1Sa32hoKJn%2BcIrDPwdFNkV0RgY%3D","user_id":"2625277236091486","user_name":"为惜晚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2625277236091486","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1661939218,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7387422173717089304","book_info":{"abstract":"楚凡穿越到平行世界，发现自己正在参加一档名为《高三生活》的真人直播节目！ 
节目组在雅博中学选取了三位主角，分别是优等生，中等生和差等生。 
楚凡很不幸，穿越到了差等生黄毛身上。
与此同时，他绑定了一个名为【好好学习】的系统。
通过正确的学习方法，获得观众的认可值。
*
优等生曹智的脸一出现在镜头里，就让人信服。
网友：“先天理科圣体皮肤拥有者”
“头不洗胡不刮，一问理科688。”
中等生王宁做错题笔记，把数学试卷上的所有题目都抄了上去。
网友：“哥们，你怎么不把教材抄上去？”
“王宁我这里有荧光笔你要不要？”
差等生楚凡...
差等生楚凡一夜狂刷一本数学练习册。
网友：“他是抄答案的吧？”
“结局不会陪你演戏，但我们会[比心][比心]”
然而，六月高考。
最不被看好的楚凡，反而成了雅博中学唯一一个考上大北大学的学生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/624e08bb0ad0516dc15829aa745e4d67","author":"一到晚上就玉玉","author_id":"","book_id":"7387422173717089304","book_name":"直播高三生活：黄毛竟然是学霸？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2173人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7387422247083835928","read_count":"2173","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"178135"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"82","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,直播,学霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o67fc4cce9272167e9bf490858a68b6a4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388758&x-signature=%2BOxcMdND2z7egKUxSRjH3FlrhQ4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1755273094242343","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032302391880294762C305744DEAC2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,
